name: fixed32_zero
schema:
namespace test.fx
message M { v @0 : fixed32 }

name: fixed32_one
schema:
namespace test.fx
message M { v @0 : fixed32 }
notes: fixed32 Q16.16 1.0 = 0x00010000 but raw value is 1 as i32 on wire... actually 1.0 = 65536 in fixed32 wire encoding

name: fixed64_zero
schema:
namespace test.fx
message M { v @0 : fixed64 }

name: set_empty
schema:
namespace test.st
message M { tags @0 : set<string> }

name: set_strings
schema:
namespace test.st
message M { tags @0 : set<string> }

name: fixed_array_u8
schema:
namespace test.fa
message M { data @0 : array<u8, 4> }

name: vec3_f32
schema:
namespace test.geom
message M { pos @0 : vec3<f32> }

name: vec2_fixed64
schema:
namespace test.geom
message M { pos @0 : vec2<fixed64> }

name: bits_inline
schema:
namespace test.bits
message M { perms @0 : bits { r, w, x } }
